title: bitwarden: brittle string-match error classification in classify_bitwarden_sdk_error
description: classify_bitwarden_sdk_error uses msg.starts_with("Received error message from server: [5") to detect server errors. This is brittle: any SDK update changing the error message prefix will silently misclassify 5xx server errors as permanent Backend errors (callers stop retrying on transient failures). Should map SDK-provided error types/codes, not parse the Display string.
